1.gl: to call out to (i.e. properly, address by name, but used in a wide variety of applications)

1.dv: a primitive root (rather identical with H7122 (קָרָא) through the idea of accosting a person met);

1.gl: perhaps properly, to arrange; but used figuratively (of words), to speak; rarely (in a destructive sense) to subdue
1.kj: answer, appoint, bid, command, commune, declare, destroy, give, name, promise, pronounce, rehearse, say, speak, be spokesman, subdue, talk, teach, tell, think, use (entreaties), ut

1.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
1.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

1.gl: an entrance (the place or the act); specifically sunset or the west; also (adverb with preposition) towards

1.gl: the sun; by implication, the east; figuratively, a ray, i.e. (architectural) a notched battlement

1.gl: strength; as adjective, mighty; especially the Almighty (but used also of any deity)

21.kj: appoint, argue, chasten, convince, correct(-ion), daysman, dispute, judge, maintain, plead, reason (together), rebuke, reprove(-r), surely, in any wise.

22.gl: to separate mentally (or distinguish), i.e.(generally) understand
22.kj: attend, consider, be cunning, diligently, direct, discern, eloquent, feel, inform, instruct, have intelligence, know, look well to, mark, perceive, be prudent, regard, (can) skill(

22.gl: a non-entity; generally used as a negative particle
22.kj: else, except, fail, (father-) less, be gone, in(-curable), neither, never, no (where), none, nor, (any, thing), not, nothing, to nought, past, un(-searchable), well-nigh, without.
22.dv: as if from a primitive root meaning to be nothing or not exist;

22.gl: 'I pray', 'now', or 'then'; added mostly to verbs (in the Imperative or Future), or to interjections, occasionally to an adverb or conjunction
22.kj: I beseech (pray) thee (you), go to, now, oh.
22.dv: a primitive particle of incitement and entreaty, which may usually be rendered;

22.gl: to snatch away, whether in a good or a bad sense
22.kj: [idiom] at all, defend, deliver (self), escape, [idiom] without fail, part, pluck, preserve, recover, rescue, rid, save, spoil, strip, [idiom] surely, take (out).
hereby (-in, -with), it, likewise, the one (other, same), she, so (much), such (deed), that, therefore, these, this (thing), thus.

22.gl: to pluck off or pull to pieces; causatively to supply with food (as in morsels)
22.kj: catch, [idiom] without doubt, feed, ravin, rend in pieces, [idiom] surely, tear (in pieces).

23.gl: to put (used in a great variety of applications, literal, figurative, inferentially, and elliptically)
23.kj: [idiom] any wise, appoint, bring, call (a name), care, cast in, change, charge, commit, consider, convey, determine, [phrase] disguise, dispose, do, get, give, heap up, hold, imput

23.gl: to see, literally or figuratively (in numerous applications, direct and implied, transitive, intransitive and causative)
23.kj: advise self, appear, approve, behold, [idiom] certainly, consider, discern, (make to) enjoy, have experience, gaze, take heed, [idiom] indeed, [idiom] joyfully, lo, look (on, one a

23.gl: to be heavy, i.e. in a bad sense (burdensome, severe, dull) or in a good sense (numerous, rich, honorable; causatively, to make weighty (in the same two senses)
23.kj: abounding with, more grievously afflict, boast, be chargeable, [idiom] be dim, glorify, be (make) glorious (things), glory, (very) great, be grievous, harden, be (make) heavy, be h

23.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
23.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

23.gl: a road (as trodden); figuratively, a course of life or mode of action, often adverb
23.kj: along, away, because of, [phrase] by, conversation, custom, (east-) ward, journey, manner, passenger, through, toward, (high-) (path-) way(-side), whither(-soever).

23.gl: properly, an extension of the hand, i.e. (by implication) avowal, or (usually) adoration; specifically, a choir of worshippers
